features.name: Pet Canvas Rendering
features.description: Canvas-based pixel-art pet rendering with animation engine, parts system, and particle effects
features.evidence: renderer tests pass, 11 animations registered, animation engine integration test green

features.name: Keyboard Activity Monitoring
features.description: Rust rdev-based global keypress counter, emits Tauri events every 5s with KPM
features.evidence: keyboard.rs unit tests, event emission verified in useKeyboardActivity hook

features.name: LLM Chat Integration
features.description: Multi-provider LLM streaming (DeepSeek, Qwen, Zhipu, Baidu, OpenAI, custom) via SSE
features.evidence: llm.rs provider URL tests, personality prompt tests, skills tests pass

features.name: Settings Persistence
features.description: JSON-based settings store with serde defaults, backward compatibility, camelCase/snake_case normalization
features.evidence: settings.rs tests, get_settings/save_settings IPC commands verified

features.name: Chat Session Management
features.description: LocalStorage-persisted chat sessions with save/load/delete/new, streaming display with blinking cursor

features.name: Pet Customization System
features.description: 6 presets, part/color picker, variant draw functions for body/head/eyes/mouth/tail/accessories
features.evidence: PetCustomizer component, petPresets.ts data, renderer part variants

features.name: Bug Drop Zone
features.description: Drag-and-drop error text analysis via LLM with ASCII fallback
features.evidence: BugDropZone component, crush_bug IPC command tests

features.name: Roast System (吐个槽)
features.description: Context-menu triggered roasts with LLM and hardcoded fallback, 5s speech bubble display
features.evidence: random_roast IPC tests, ContextMenu roasting guard, SpeechBubble timing

features.name: System Tray & Window Management
features.description: Frameless always-on-top window at bottom-right, system tray show/settings/quit, auto-hide on inactivity

features.name: Harness Engineering Integration
features.description: Architecture lint, file protection hooks, AGENTS.md contract, POARC workflow, CI-ready checks

features.name: Crash Recovery & Health Monitoring
features.description: Custom panic hook writes crash marker to %APPDATA%, crash-recovery event on next startup, graceful shutdown with keyboard/stream stop + tokio drain
features.evidence: crash.rs, shutdown.rs, lib.rs crash marker detection

features.name: Structured Logging System
features.description: tracing-based logging: debug mode with colored stdout, release mode with rolling daily JSON logs in %APPDATA%/coderpet/logs/
features.evidence: logging.rs, tracing crate integration, diagnostic logging in llm.rs

features.name: Compliment & Joke System
features.description: Context menu items for random_compliment and random_joke with LLM-generated and static fallbacks
features.evidence: random_compliment and random_joke IPC commands in commands.rs, ContextMenu integration

features.name: Session File Persistence
features.description: Chat sessions saved to coderpet_sessions.json on disk via IPC (save_chat_sessions/load_chat_sessions), with localStorage fallback
features.evidence: save_chat_sessions and load_chat_sessions IPC commands, chatStore backend sync

features.name: Chat Overlay Window
features.description: Full streaming chat overlay in pet window with markdown rendering, history sidebar, skills panel, provider/model status display
features.evidence: ChatOverlay.tsx (540 lines), PetWindow.tsx integration, streamStore event routing

features.name: Dedicated Settings Window
features.description: Separate settings window (460x620, resizable, solid background) with multi-tab UI: character, customizer, LLM, general

features.name: Stream Control Infrastructure
features.description: Per-stream stop-flag registry using Arc<AtomicBool> with register_stream/stop_all/unregister_stream, mpsc token relay
features.evidence: stream_control.rs, llm_stop_stream IPC, mpsc channel in llm_chat_stream

features.name: Connection Testing
features.description: Test LLM API connectivity via test_llm_connection IPC command with provider-specific validation
features.evidence: test_llm_connection IPC command, SettingsPanel LLM tab connection test UI

features.name: Error Type System
features.description: AppError enum (Llm, Settings, Io, ApiKeyMissing) with Serialize for IPC responses, thiserror integration
features.evidence: errors.rs, thiserror derive, Serialize for Tauri command responses

features.name: Clipboard Integration
features.description: Wire up get_clipboard_text IPC using tauri-plugin-clipboard-manager. Currently returns empty string. Enable native clipboard for bug drop zone fallback and paste-from-clipboard feature.

features.name: Code Review Flow
features.description: Add dedicated code_review scenario instruction in build_system_prompt() and a dedicated IPC command that accepts code snippets for review. Currently code_review is listed in AVAILABLE_SKILLS but has no dedicated flow.

features.name: Pet Mood & Affection System
features.description: Add click-to-pet interaction, feeding mechanic, mood states (happy/sad/bored), and affinity tracking. Pet-click animation exists but has no stateful response.

features.name: Desktop Notifications
features.description: Wire up tauri-plugin-notification for rest reminders and pet attention requests. Plugin is installed but unused.

features.name: Achievement & Milestone System
features.description: Power achievements from cumulative coding minutes counter: '100 hours of coding', 'first bug crushed', '10 roasts requested', etc.

features.name: Pet Preset Share/Import/Export
features.description: Save/load pet configurations as shareable JSON files. Import via file picker or clipboard paste, export to file.

features.name: Clean Up ChatPanel Dead Code
features.description: ChatPanel.tsx is a near-duplicate of ChatOverlay.tsx and not rendered anywhere. Either integrate it as a standalone chat window or remove to reduce duplication.

features.name: Rust Module Test Coverage
features.description: Add unit tests for keyboard.rs, window_manage.rs, tray.rs, shutdown.rs, crash.rs, logging.rs, errors.rs, and stream_control.rs. Currently only commands.rs, llm.rs, and settings.rs have tests.

features.name: Multi-Pet Support
features.description: Extend architecture to support multiple pets on screen simultaneously. Requires PetConfig array in state, multi-pet renderer, and per-pet animation management.

features.name: Additional Skins & Theme Editor
features.description: Add more UI skins beyond current 3 (matrix, retro, hologram). Build a custom color picker for user-defined themes.
